description: An attorney is taking over a case from a prior counsel and needs to file a notice of appearance with the court.

nodes.task_description: Draft the Notice of Appearance, including the case caption, the attorney's name, bar number, and contact information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent prepares the correct legal document.

nodes.task_description: Electronically file the notice with the court through the CM/ECF system.

expected_outcome.value: The notice is successfully filed on the case docket.

nodes.task_description: Serve a copy of the filed notice on all other parties in the case.

expected_outcome.value: All parties are formally notified that the new attorney is now counsel of record.
